About The Roamed Collective

The Roamed Collective, led by Kimberly Hearn, captures moments with creativity and a storytelling approach. Whether it’s a special event, lifestyle shoot, or a wedding, Kimberly ensures every detail is beautifully documented, creating memories you'll cherish forever.
